welcome_dialog.title: Welcome to IronCalc
welcome_dialog.subtitle: Start fresh, bring your data, or explore what's possible.
welcome_dialog.storage_warning: <warn>Warning!</warn> This app is a proof of concept, not a finished product. Feel free to explore, share, and upload/download models, but don't share or upload models with sensitive or private data. Data will be deleted periodically. <docsLink>Read more</docsLink>

templates.yearly_calendar_description: Plan and visualize the full year ahead.
templates.mortgage_calculator_description: Estimate payments, interest, and overall cost.
templates.crossword_description: Fill in the grid and solve the clues.
templates.travel_expenses_tracker_description: Track trip costs and stay on budget.
templates.gantt_project_tracker_description: Plan tasks and timelines on a Gantt chart.
templates.weekly_timesheet_description: Log and review hours worked each week.
templates.eu_salary_calculator_description: Estimate net salary after EU taxes.
templates.absence_schedule_description: Track team vacations and time off.

left_drawer.search_no_results: Your search does not match any workbooks.

alert.title: Heads up!
alert.subtitle: IronCalc stores your data only in your browser's local storage.
alert.subtitle2: <bold>Download your XLSX often</bold> – future versions may not open current workbooks, even if shared.

left_drawer.bulk_delete_message_one: This workbook will be permanently deleted.

import.title: Import an .xlsx file
import.subtitle: Drag and drop a file here or
import.learn_more: Learn more about importing files into IronCalc

delete_workbook.title: Are you sure?
delete_workbook.subtitle: The workbook '{{workbookName}}' will be permanently deleted.

title_input.warning_text1: This workbook is stored only in your browser. To keep it safe, download it as .xlsx.

share_popover.info_text: Anyone with the link will be able to access a copy of this workbook
